title: The Cultist
description: Add a Horror Entity Called The Cultist
body:
# The Cultist
All the time its quite in the peace in minecraft world right? Want to make it a little scary? This Mod is for yo!!

It add a entity called the cultist and it kind of a horror mob. It will spawn in both day and night.

There is 2 variations of it, one will only stare at the player other will charge at the player(If the player is close to the cultist).

The Cultist will always be spawn around the player and will path finds it's way to the player. To make it fair it will spawn every 10-15 minutes. 

P.S if it does't spawn re-log in the world to fix it.(Only do this if it doesn't spawn for like 2-3 minecraft days)

Its a NeoForge mod , it is both client and server side.

Join my patreon for free clicking [Here](https://patreon.com/Rafsan36?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)

You can talk to me in my discord server https://discord.gg/7JWV4zr4

### Massive update:
- Completely changing the cultist.
- Added 2 new harmless mobs (followers).
- 4 new events will happen.
- New animation for walking, idle, attacking.
- Abilites for the when the cultist attackes
- 1 new item to stop the cultist
## Change log for 1.21.8
- New sounds added
- New structure added
- New lores added
- Fixed few bugs
